subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! Thy letter was received, and inasmuch as the fragrance of love for the One True Friend was wafting therefrom, it caught the attention [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله نامه ات رسید و چون عرف محبت حضرت دوست یکتا از آن متضوع بود لحاظ
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @praise and encouragement, @exhortations and counsels
